code: import{createContext,useContext,useState,useCallback}from'react';import{AVATAR_COLORS,ZONES,generateName}from'../data/constants';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AppContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);const getInitialProfile=()=>{try{const stored=localStorage.getItem('mohalla_profile_v4');if(stored)return JSON.parse(stored);}catch{}return{name:generateName(),color:AVATAR_COLORS[0],zone:ZONES[0],trust:42,tips:3,faresAdded:1,votes:7};};export function AppProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[page,setPageState]=useState('home');const[profile,setProfileState]=useState(getInitialProfile);const[toast,setToast]=useState(null);const[toastTimer,setToastTimer]=useState(null);const setPage=useCallback(p=>{setPageState(p);window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});},[]);const setProfile=useCallback(p=>{setProfileState(p);try{localStorage.setItem('mohalla_profile_v4',JSON.stringify(p));}catch{}},[]);const showToast=useCallback(function(msg){let type=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:'default';if(toastTimer)clearTimeout(toastTimer);setToast({msg,type});const t=setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);setToastTimer(t);},[toastTimer]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AppContext.Provider,{value:{page,setPage,profile,setProfile,showToast,toast},children:children});}export const useApp=()=>useContext(AppContext);
